message:
chore(deps): bump cargo-examples group + refresh root lockfile

Applied the dependency updates from dependabot PR #41 directly to main —
project policy is to never merge outside PRs, even bot ones.

Workspace dependency bumps (semver-compatible except as noted):
- unicode-segmentation: 1.10 → 1.13
- toml: 0.8 → 1.1 (major; only consumer is `lipgloss::theme` which uses
  the stable top-level `from_str` / `to_string_pretty` APIs that are
  unchanged across 0.8 → 1.x)
- once_cell: 1.19 → 1.21
- tempfile: 3.10 → 3.27

Also refreshed the root `Cargo.lock` (dependabot only updated the
`/examples` lockfile, which is what was breaking `cargo build --locked`
on every CI runner — see PR #41 CI logs).

Verified: `cargo build --locked --workspace --all-targets` succeeds and
`cargo test --workspace --lib` passes 231/231.
